message:
fix(btree): free overflow chains from interior index cells in free_subtree_pages

Interior cells of index B-trees carry key payloads that can spill into
overflow pages. The previous code only freed overflow from leaf cells,
leaving interior overflow pages orphaned on DROP INDEX for indexes with
large keys.

Now free_subtree_pages processes overflow chains for ALL cells (both
interior and leaf) before recursing into child subtrees. Table B-tree
interior cells only carry rowids (no overflow possible), so the check
is harmless for those — overflow_page will always be None.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
